name: minimalfirewall
desc: A lightweight frontend for Windows Firewall. Harden your security with Lockdown Mode, real-time connection alerts, and rule auditing. No custom drivers or tele…
descFull: A lightweight frontend for Windows Firewall. Harden your security with Lockdown Mode, real-time connection alerts, and rule auditing. No custom drivers or telemetry. Block "phoning home" and stay private.
